Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Formulary File Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 2.2 11 

PLAN_ID 

LABEL: Part D Plan Benefit Package Identifier 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the unique plan benefit package (PBP) number for the Part D plan sponsor's contract. 
CMS assigns an identifier to each PBP within a contract that a Part D plan sponsor has with CMS. This 
field is a key that links of Part D sponsor's contract and plan identifiers. 

SHORT NAME: —
